# TS9403

**Category:** Extension Methods · **Severity:** Error

## Message

```
registerExtension expects 2 arguments: (typeName, function)
```

## Explanation

registerExtension() registers a single function as an extension method.

Usage:
  registerExtension("string", capitalize);

This makes capitalize() available as a method on string.

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- generated:end -->
